form.formComment: Won two starts back over 390m at this track. Last start she finished 4th on March 27 over 300m at Healesville behind Truth Teller beaten 2.5 lengths (17.19) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.32) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 3.5 lengths. Has two successes and two minors from six starts from box 2. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.32) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 3.5 lengths. Has two successes and two minors from six starts from box 2. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in back straight.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a 0.8 lengths second (22.64) over 400m at Warragul. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Sale to win by 1.3 lengths in 24.42, beating Dr. Erica. Last start finished 7th over 435m at Sale beaten 9 lengths (25.18) behind Minter Scorch in a Grade 4 on March 29. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (22.38) at Ballarat. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.98) at Warragul in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and six minors from 16 starts from box 6. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.4 lengths in 22.28, beating Chalk And Cheese. Last start finished last on January 30 over 425m at Bendigo behind Sweet Love beaten 13 lengths (24.77) in a Mix 3/4. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5.5 lengths third (22.18) over 390m at this track. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.
